warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round PVC pipe
30sec e/s PVC Shoulder Opener
3 PVC Pass Throughs
3 PVC Around the Worlds each way
10 Worlds Greatest Stretch
10 Band Row Rotate Press
2 rounds (PVC/Barbell):
3 Muscle Clean
3 Clean Pull
3 Hang Power Clean
10 Front Squat

strength.name: Power Clean
strength.description:
4x3 | * Focus on triple extension
* Fast Elbows | E2MOM 12min
BUILD 3 Sets
00:00 3 @ 50%
02:00 3 @ 60%
HOLD 4 Sets
04:00 3 @ 70%
06:00 3 @ 70%
08:00 3 @ 70%
10:00 3 @ 70%

strength.name: Front Squat
strength.description:
5x5 | * Breathe and brace at the top of each rep
* Elbows Up
* Keep knees out | E3MOM 21min
BUILD 2 Sets
00:00 5 @ 50 + 60%
03:00 5 @ 70%
HOLD 5 Sets
06:00 5 @ 75%
09:00 5 @ 75%
12:00 5 @ 75%
15:00 5 @ 75%
18:00 5 @ 75%

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
E3MOM x 12
200m Run
5 Squat cleans @ 80/50kg
Cycle all 5 or quick singles
record your fastest round

hypertrophy.reasoning: Back and biceps work opposes anterior chain fatigue while glutes support posterior chain balance without competing for CNS resources.

siri_text: Friday's workout. Strength: Power Clean, 4 by 3 at 70 percent. Strength: Front Squat, 5 by 5 at 75 percent. Metcon: EMOM: 200m Run, 5 Squat cleans @ 80/50kg. For hypertrophy, focus on back, biceps, rear delts.
